_meta.method: MiniLM-L6 cosine similarity, max-over-training-set per bench scenario

leakage_clean_bench_subset._definition: scenarios with max cosine to training < 0.70

interpretation: SUBSTANTIAL semantic overlap. >30% of bench is highly similar to training. The 100% in-distribution numbers are heavily memorization-driven. The honest claim is the leakage-clean subset performance + novel split (97.1%). v3 must retrain on held-out template families.
